name: C.C. Wei
background: Dr. C.C. Wei is the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of TSMC. Prior to becoming Chairman in June 2024, he served as CEO since 2018 and President and Co-CEO from 2013 to 2018. He joined TSMC in 1998 and has held various senior positions in operations and R&D. He holds a Ph.D. in electrical engineering from Yale University.
